rag_rules: Use AGREE syntax for assume, guarantee, eq, const, and assign statements
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for contracts
Place component type contracts in valid component type scopes
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use visible identifiers for assumptions and guarantees
Avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for assumptions and guarantees
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in dependency guarantees
Use valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for declarations
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for contracts
Use valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for declarations
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar type names (e.g., integer, boolean)
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
